name: Lumentum Holdings Inc.
summary: Lumentum Holdings Inc. is a leading provider of optical and photonic products operating in two segments: Cloud & Networking and Industrial Tech. Its Cloud & Networking portfolio includes optical chips, components, modules, and subsystems for cloud data centers, AI/ML infrastructure, and telecom networks. Its Industrial Tech products include solid-state, fiber, diode, and gas lasers for 3D sensing, precision material processing, semiconductor fabrication, and electric vehicle production.

products.name: Optical and photonic chips, components, modules, subsystems
products.description: Supplied to cloud data center operators, AI/ML infrastructure providers, and network equipment manufacturers for high-capacity optical links.

products.name: Short-pulse solid-state lasers
products.description: Used in industrial manufacturing for precision material processing, semiconductor fabrication, and micromachining.

products.name: Kilowatt-class fiber lasers
products.description: Used in industrial applications including metal cutting, welding, and advanced manufacturing.

products.name: Diode lasers
products.description: Used in consumer 3D sensing cameras primarily integrated into mobile devices.

products.name: Gas lasers
products.description: Serving a wide range of industrial end-market applications.

products.name: Coherent components and modules
products.description: Advanced coherent optical components for cloud and telecom network infrastructure, expanded via Oclaro acquisition.

products.name: Advanced optical modules (Cloud Light)
products.description: Optical modules for data center interconnect applications, particularly optimized for AI/ML infrastructure.

products.name: Coherent DSPs, ASICs, and optical transceivers
products.description: Products for telecommunications and datacenter infrastructure acquired from IPG Photonics telecom transmission product lines.
